generated_oml:
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for heatbed temperature measurement, range -55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ChamberTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for chamber air temperature measurement, range -55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChamberTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for ambient temperature measurement, range -55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance PowerSupplySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Power supply current and voltage sensor for monitoring power consumption"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PowerSupplyDataTransmitted
]

instance FileUploadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for calibration data file upload from experimental tests"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CalibrationDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance ChamberTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChamberTemperatureSensor
]

instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance PowerSupplyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerSupplySensor
]

instance CalibrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom FileUploadSensor
]

instance TemperatureSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted, ChamberTemperatureDataTransmitted, AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance PowerSupplyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power supply voltage and current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerSupplyDataTransmitted
]

instance CalibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibration data from experimental tests"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CalibrationDataTransmitted
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simplified energy balance model with two parameters for thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonSciPy
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed energy flow model with four parameters for thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonSciPy
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for temperature data transmission via Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, TemperatureControlService
]

instance PythonSciPy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python with SciPy for model calibration and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ParameterCalibrationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, TemperatureControlService
]

instance OneWireBus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus for communication with DS18S20 temperature sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPiPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller platform"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, TemperatureControlService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using calibrated Model A and Model B simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePrediction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance using temperature predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoring, PerformanceOptimization
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration via non-linear least squares optimization using SciPy"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedParameters
]

instance TemperatureControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control decisions based on bang-bang logic with upper/lower temperature limits"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureControlAction
]

instance TemperaturePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance SafetyMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring of temperature deviations for thermal incubator"
]

instance PerformanceOptimization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal performance monitoring for thermal incubator operation"
]

instance CalibratedParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters for thermal models from experimental data"
]

instance TemperatureControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control action for heatbed and fan based on temperature limits"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system with styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed (214x214x3 mm), fan (0.02 m³/s airflow), Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, PCB, PowerSupply, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, ChamberTemperatureSensor, AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with 214x214x3 mm dimensions controlled via MOSFETs for 4A current"
]

    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow and 12V/24V operation actuated through Raspberry Pi GPIO via PCB"
]

    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for heatbed and fan control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for temperature regulation in thermal incubator"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan activation) sent from controller to low-level driver via RabbitMQ, which executes actuation through MOSFETs and GPIO."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time control with sensor updates and actuation within seconds; fan airflow cycles air in 2 seconds, heatbed response time under 2 seconds."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of RabbitMQ server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models communicating via message passing; data flow from sensors → low-level driver → RabbitMQ → controller/models."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; models integrated into DT for the deployed physical incubator system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via experimental testing (e.g., temperature uniformity checks), calibration using least squares minimization of residual error; Model B better predicts thermal inertia."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ for inter-component communication, 1-Wire bus for sensors, GPIO for actuator control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B; RabbitMQ server runs on-device."
]

]
